title: Shaza's 'just holding on'
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Local singer-songwriter Shaza is taking on the new year with her new single, Just Hold On. The track, which was born from personal experiences and battles that she has overcome, is a powerful reminder of hope and resilience through adversity.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Local singer-songwriter Shaza is taking on the new year with her new single, Just Hold On. The track, which was born from personal experiences and battles that she has overcome, is a powerful reminder of hope and resilience through adversity."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"During a challenging period in her life, Shaza found solace and a safe space in her music, using it as a medium to heal and uplift herself.","html":"During a challenging period in her life, Shaza found solace and a safe space in her music, using it as a medium to heal and uplift herself."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"I was dealing with loss, personal changes, and tragedy,\" she shares. \"I spontaneously started writing this song to motivate and uplift myself, and I hope it does the same for others.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her intention is clear - provide an instant emotional lift through her music. The song conveys a message of optimism, reminding listeners that bad days will pass and brighter days are ahead.","html":"Her intention is clear - provide an instant emotional lift through her music. The song conveys a message of optimism, reminding listeners that bad days will pass and brighter days are ahead."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Collaborating with Hit Kitchen Studios, owned by multi-award-winning artist and producer Daniel Baron, Shaza found the perfect partner to bring her vision to life.","html":"Collaborating with Hit Kitchen Studios, owned by multi-award-winning artist and producer Daniel Baron, Shaza found the perfect partner to bring her vision to life."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Daniel is very talented,\" she says. \"He captured the essence of the song brilliantly, creating a contemporary and euphoric sound.\"","html":"\"Daniel is very talented,\" she says. \"He captured the essence of the song brilliantly, creating a contemporary and euphoric sound.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Shaza's music is a fusion of energetic electronic, pop, and rock elements, characterised by vibrant beats and pulsating synthesisers.","html":"Shaza's music is a fusion of energetic electronic, pop, and rock elements, characterised by vibrant beats and pulsating synthesisers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her sound, as showcased in Just Hold On, is both powerful and vibrant. For those new to Shaza's work, she has had a lifelong passion for music. Growing up in Johannesburg, she was surrounded by melodies from a young age.","html":"Her sound, as showcased in Just Hold On, is both powerful and vibrant. For those new to Shaza's work, she has had a lifelong passion for music. Growing up in Johannesburg, she was surrounded by melodies from a young age."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Her parents recognised her talent early on and encouraged her to participate in talent shows, karaoke nights and open mic events."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This paved the way for her career as a performing artist. Since she relocated to Knysna she has taken the Garden Route music scene by storm.","html":"This paved the way for her career as a performing artist. Since she relocated to Knysna she has taken the Garden Route music scene by storm."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Shaza is popular with Garden Route restaurants and event organisers, performing regularly, and her new single showcases her talents to the region and to the country at large.","html":"Shaza is popular with Garden Route restaurants and event organisers, performing regularly, and her new single showcases her talents to the region and to the country at large."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"She recently appeared on the Kfm Top 40 with Carl Wastie as a musical guest to promote her new track, and continues to grow the footprint of her music."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When asked about her musical inspirations, Shaza cites legendary artists such as Hans Zimmer, Queen, Andrea Bocelli, Jon Bellion and Tash Sultana.","html":"When asked about her musical inspirations, Shaza cites legendary artists such as Hans Zimmer, Queen, Andrea Bocelli, Jon Bellion and Tash Sultana."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She would love to collaborate with the likes of Jon Bellion, Zakes Bantwini, Will Linley, Kygo and Ed Sheeran.","html":"She would love to collaborate with the likes of Jon Bellion, Zakes Bantwini, Will Linley, Kygo and Ed Sheeran."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"As for what's on the horizon, Shaza is already hard at work on several projects, with plans to release an EP in the near future."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
